list.name: OOM Kill
list.rawQuery:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'OOM Kill: ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    '\nRSS max: ', formatReadableSize(rss_max_bytes),
    '\nCgroup: ', cgroup,
    '\nCmd: ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), '')
  ) AS text,
  'OOM Kill' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'oom_kill'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

target.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'OOM Kill: ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    '\nRSS max: ', formatReadableSize(rss_max_bytes),
    '\nCgroup: ', cgroup,
    '\nCmd: ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), '')
  ) AS text,
  'OOM Kill' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'oom_kill'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

list.name: Non-Zero Exit
list.rawQuery:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'EXIT rc=', toString(exit_code),
    ' | ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    ' | ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), ''),
    if(cgroup != '', concat(' | cgroup: ', cgroup), '')
  ) AS text,
  'exit_error' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'exit'
  AND exit_code != 0
  AND (comm, exit_code) NOT IN (${exit_excludes:raw})
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

target.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp AS time,
  concat(
    'EXIT rc=', toString(exit_code),
    ' | ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    ' | ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), ''),
    if(cgroup != '', concat(' | cgroup: ', cgroup), '')
  ) AS text,
  'exit_error' AS tags
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'exit'
  AND exit_code != 0
  AND (comm, exit_code) NOT IN (${exit_excludes:raw})
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp

description: eBPF-based process monitoring: CPU, memory, cgroups, I/O, network, files

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, count(DISTINCT pid) AS processes FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, sum(rss_bytes) AS total_rss FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, sum(cpu_usage_ratio) AS total_cpu FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, count(DISTINCT cgroup) AS cgroups FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND cgroup_memory_current > 0 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, count() AS events FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type IN ('fork','exec','exit','oom_kill') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, count() AS oom_kills FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='oom_kill' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND cpu_usage_ratio > 0.001
    AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY avg(cpu_usage_ratio) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT time, process, sum(val) AS cpu
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
    pid,
    if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
       concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']'), 'other') AS process,
    max(cpu_usage_ratio) AS val
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND cpu_usage_ratio > 0.001
    AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
  GROUP BY time, pid, process
)
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND rss_bytes > 1048576
    AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY avg(rss_bytes) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT time, process, sum(val) AS rss
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
    pid,
    if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
       concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']'), 'other') AS process,
    max(rss_bytes) AS val
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND rss_bytes > 1048576
    AND (length('${process_search}') = 0 OR (exec ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR comm ILIKE '%${process_search}%' OR args ILIKE '%${process_search}%'))
  GROUP BY time, pid, process
)
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND file_write_bytes > 0
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY sum(file_write_bytes) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
     concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] write'), 'other write') AS series,
  sum(file_write_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND file_write_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND file_read_bytes > 0
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY sum(file_read_bytes) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
     concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] read'), 'other read') AS series,
  sum(file_read_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND file_read_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND net_conn_tx_bytes > 0
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
     concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] TX'), 'other TX') AS series,
  sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND net_conn_tx_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND net_conn_rx_bytes > 0
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY sum(net_conn_rx_bytes) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
     concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), '] RX'), 'other RX') AS series,
  sum(net_conn_rx_bytes) / 60 AS bps
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  AND net_conn_rx_bytes > 0
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY count() DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
     concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']'), 'other') AS process,
  count() AS file_ops
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'file_close'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
GROUP BY time, process
HAVING file_ops > 1
ORDER BY time

panels.title: File Operations per Minute by Process

targets.rawSql:
WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY count() DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top15),
     concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']'), 'other') AS process,
  count() AS connections
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
GROUP BY time, process
HAVING connections > 1
ORDER BY time

SELECT *,
  (cpu_cores / nullIf(max(cpu_cores) OVER (), 0)
 + rss / nullIf(max(rss) OVER (), 0)
 + io_total / nullIf(max(io_total) OVER (), 0)
 + net_total / nullIf(max(net_total) OVER (), 0)) AS rating,
  max(io_total) OVER () AS io_total_max,
  max(net_total) OVER () AS net_total_max
FROM (
  SELECT
    any(hostname) AS host,
    comm,
    concat(any(exec), ' ', any(args)) AS cmdline,
    any(uid) AS uid,
    length(groupUniqArray(pid)) AS pids,
    sum(cpu_usage_ratio) AS cpu_cores,
    sum(rss_bytes) AS rss,
    sum(io_read_bytes) + sum(io_write_bytes) AS io_total,
    sum(net_tx_bytes) + sum(net_rx_bytes) AS net_total,
    sum(threads) AS threads,
    max(uptime_seconds) AS uptime
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND timestamp >= (SELECT max(timestamp) - INTERVAL 1 SECOND FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}))
  GROUP BY comm
)
ORDER BY rating DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT max(rss) AS "rss Max" FROM (  SELECT sum(rss_bytes) AS rss  FROM default.process_metrics  WHERE event_type='snapshot'    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})    AND timestamp >= (SELECT max(timestamp) - INTERVAL 1 SECOND FROM default.process_metrics WHERE event_type='snapshot' AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}))  GROUP BY comm)

SELECT *,
  max(net_total) OVER () AS net_total_max,
  (connections / nullIf(max(connections) OVER (), 0)
 + net_total / nullIf(max(net_total) OVER (), 0)
 + avg_duration_ms / nullIf(max(avg_duration_ms) OVER (), 0)) AS rating
FROM (
  SELECT
    any(hostname) AS host,
    comm,
    net_remote_addr AS remote,
    count() AS connections,
    sum(net_conn_tx_bytes) + sum(net_conn_rx_bytes) AS net_total,
    avg(net_duration_ms) AS avg_duration_ms
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND comm != 'process_metr'
  GROUP BY comm, net_remote_addr
)
ORDER BY rating DESC
LIMIT 100

WITH owners AS (
  SELECT net_remote_addr AS remote_addr, any(comm) AS owner
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'net_close'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND net_remote_addr != ''
  GROUP BY net_remote_addr
),
resolved AS (
  SELECT r.timestamp,
    if(o.owner != '', o.owner, r.comm) AS process,
    r.sec_remote_addr AS remote_addr
  FROM default.process_metrics r
  LEFT JOIN owners o ON r.sec_remote_addr = o.remote_addr
  WHERE r.event_type = 'tcp_retrans'
    AND r.timestamp >= $__fromTime AND r.timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND r.hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND r.rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
),
labels AS (
  SELECT
    process,
    concat(process, ': [', arrayStringConcat(arraySlice(groupUniqArray(remote_addr), 1, 5), ', '),
      if(length(groupUniqArray(remote_addr)) > 5, ', ...', ''), ']') AS label,
    count() AS cnt
  FROM resolved
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY cnt DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(r.timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  coalesce(l.label, 'other') AS process,
  count() AS retransmits
FROM resolved r
LEFT JOIN labels l ON r.process = l.process
GROUP BY time, process
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time,
  retrans / nullIf(closes, 0) AS retransmit_ratio
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
    countIf(event_type = 'tcp_retrans') AS retrans,
    countIf(event_type = 'net_close') AS closes
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type IN ('tcp_retrans', 'net_close')
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY time
)
WHERE closes > 0
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (
  SELECT cgroup
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_cpu_nr_throttled > 0
  GROUP BY cgroup
  ORDER BY max(cgroup_cpu_nr_throttled) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT time, cgroup, throttle_rate FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
    if(cgroup IN (SELECT cgroup FROM top), cgroup, 'other') AS cgroup,
    sum(cgroup_cpu_nr_throttled) / nullIf(sum(cgroup_cpu_nr_periods), 0) AS throttle_rate
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_cpu_nr_periods > 0
  GROUP BY time, cgroup
)
WHERE throttle_rate > 0
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (
  SELECT cgroup
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_cpu_throttled_usec > 0
  GROUP BY cgroup
  ORDER BY max(cgroup_cpu_throttled_usec) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
),
data AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
    if(cgroup IN (SELECT cgroup FROM top), cgroup, 'other') AS cgroup,
    max(cgroup_cpu_throttled_usec) AS val
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_cpu_throttled_usec > 0
  GROUP BY time, cgroup
)
SELECT time, cgroup, throttled_usec
FROM (
  SELECT
    time, cgroup,
    val - lagInFrame(val, 1, 0) OVER (PARTITION BY cgroup ORDER BY time) AS throttled_usec
  FROM data
)
WHERE throttled_usec > 0
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (
  SELECT concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') AS process
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND nivcsw > 0
  GROUP BY process
  ORDER BY max(nivcsw) - min(nivcsw) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
),
data AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
    if(concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']') IN (SELECT process FROM top),
       concat(comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']'), 'other') AS process,
    pid,
    max(nivcsw) AS val
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND nivcsw > 0
  GROUP BY time, pid, process
),
agg AS (
  SELECT time, process, sum(val) AS val FROM data GROUP BY time, process
)
SELECT time, process, delta AS nivcsw
FROM (
  SELECT time, process,
    val - lagInFrame(val, 1, 0) OVER (PARTITION BY process ORDER BY time) AS delta
  FROM agg
)
WHERE delta > 0
ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    preempted_by_comm AS preemptor,
    comm AS victim
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type = 'snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
    AND preempted_by_comm != ''
    AND preempted_by_comm NOT LIKE 'kworker%'
    AND preempted_by_comm NOT LIKE 'ksoftirqd%'
    AND preempted_by_comm NOT LIKE 'migration%'
    AND preempted_by_comm NOT LIKE 'watchdog%'
    AND preempted_by_comm NOT IN ('rcu_preempt', 'rcu_sched', 'idle')
),
labels AS (
  SELECT preemptor,
    concat(preemptor, ': [',
      arrayStringConcat(arraySlice(groupUniqArray(victim), 1, 5), ', '),
      if(length(groupUniqArray(victim)) > 5, ', ...', ''),
    ']') AS label,
    count() AS cnt
  FROM filtered
  GROUP BY preemptor
  ORDER BY cnt DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(f.timestamp, INTERVAL 60 SECOND) AS time,
  coalesce(l.label, 'other') AS preemptor,
  count() AS preemptions
FROM filtered f
LEFT JOIN labels l ON f.preemptor = l.preemptor
GROUP BY time, preemptor
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT cgroup
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_memory_current > 10485760
  GROUP BY cgroup
  ORDER BY avg(cgroup_memory_current) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT time, cgroup, sum(val) AS mem_current
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
    if(cgroup IN (SELECT cgroup FROM top15), cgroup, 'other') AS cgroup,
    max(cgroup_memory_current) AS val
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_memory_current > 0
  GROUP BY time, cgroup
  HAVING val > 10485760
)
GROUP BY time, cgroup
ORDER BY time

WITH top15 AS (
  SELECT cgroup
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_memory_max > 0
    AND cgroup_memory_current > 0
  GROUP BY cgroup
  ORDER BY avg(cgroup_memory_current / cgroup_memory_max) DESC
  LIMIT ${topn:raw}
)
SELECT time, cgroup, sum(mem_cur) / sum(mem_max) AS usage_pct
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time,
    if(cgroup IN (SELECT cgroup FROM top15), cgroup, 'other') AS cgroup,
    max(cgroup_memory_current) AS mem_cur,
    max(cgroup_memory_max) AS mem_max
  FROM default.process_metrics
  WHERE event_type='snapshot'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
    AND cgroup_memory_max > 0
    AND cgroup_memory_current > 0
  GROUP BY time, cgroup
)
GROUP BY time, cgroup
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  any(hostname) AS host,
  cgroup,
  any(rule) AS rule,
  max(cgroup_memory_current) AS mem_current,
  max(cgroup_memory_max) AS mem_max,
  if(max(cgroup_memory_max) > 0, max(cgroup_memory_current) / max(cgroup_memory_max), 0) AS usage_pct,
  max(cgroup_swap_current) AS swap,
  max(cgroup_cpu_weight) AS cpu_weight,
  max(cgroup_pids_current) AS pids
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type='snapshot'
  AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 2 MINUTE
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND cgroup_memory_current > 0
GROUP BY cgroup
ORDER BY usage_pct DESC

SELECT
  timestamp AS timestamp,
  concat(
    'uid=', toString(loginuid),
    ' tty=pts/', toString(tty_nr - 34816),
    ' rc=', toString(exit_code),
    ' | ',
    exec,
    if(args != '', concat(' ', args), '')
  ) AS body,
  if(exit_code = 0, 'info', 'error') AS level,
  toString(loginuid) AS uid,
  concat('pts/', toString(tty_nr - 34816)) AS tty,
  comm,
  toString(exit_code) AS rc
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'exit'
  AND tty_nr >= 34816
  AND loginuid != 4294967295
  AND loginuid > 0
  AND comm NOT IN (${audit_comm_excludes:raw})
  AND NOT arrayExists(p -> exec LIKE p, [${audit_exec_excludes:raw}])
  AND (comm, args) NOT IN (${audit_comm_args_excludes:raw})
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  timestamp AS timestamp,
  concat(
    comm,
    '[', toString(pid), ']',
    ' → ',
    'SIG', CASE sig_num
      WHEN 1 THEN 'HUP'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'INT'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'QUIT'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'ABRT'
      WHEN 9 THEN 'KILL'
      WHEN 10 THEN 'USR1'
      WHEN 12 THEN 'USR2'
      WHEN 13 THEN 'PIPE'
      WHEN 14 THEN 'ALRM'
      WHEN 15 THEN 'TERM'
      WHEN 17 THEN 'CHLD'
      WHEN 19 THEN 'STOP'
      WHEN 20 THEN 'TSTP'
      ELSE toString(sig_num)
    END,
    ' → ',
    sig_target_comm,
    '[', toString(sig_target_pid), ']',
    if(sig_result != 0, concat(' FAILED(', toString(sig_result), ')'), '')
  ) AS body,
  if(sig_result = 0, if(sig_num = 9, 'error', 'info'), 'warning') AS level,
  comm AS sender,
  toString(pid) AS sender_pid,
  sig_target_comm AS target,
  toString(sig_target_pid) AS target_pid,
  toString(sig_num) AS signal,
  rule
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE event_type = 'signal'
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  timestamp AS timestamp,
  concat(
    if(event_type = 'oom_kill', '🔴 OOM KILL', concat('⚠️ EXIT rc=', toString(exit_code))),
    ' | ', comm, ' [', toString(pid), ']',
    ' | ', exec, if(args != '', concat(' ', args), ''),
    if(cgroup != '', concat(' | cgroup: ', cgroup), ''),
    if(event_type = 'oom_kill', concat(' | RSS max: ', formatReadableSize(rss_max_bytes)), '')
  ) AS body,
  if(event_type = 'oom_kill', 'critical', 'error') AS level,
  event_type,
  comm,
  toString(pid) AS pid,
  toString(exit_code) AS rc,
  rule,
  cgroup
FROM default.process_metrics
WHERE (event_type = 'oom_kill' OR (event_type = 'exit' AND exit_code != 0
    AND (comm, exit_code) NOT IN (${exit_excludes:raw})))
  AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring})
  AND rule IN (${rule:sqlstring})
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT hostname FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY hostname
list.label: Server
list.name: hostname
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT hostname FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY hostname

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT rule FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) ORDER BY rule

list.query: SELECT DISTINCT rule FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) ORDER BY rule

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT cgroup FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) AND cgroup != '' ORDER BY cgroup

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT uid FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) ORDER BY uid
list.label: UID
list.name: uid
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT uid FROM default.process_metrics WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND hostname IN (${hostname:sqlstring}) ORDER BY uid
